The Strategic Masterpiece That Redefined Warfare

By techmadeeasy

⚔️ Interactive Battle of Bach Dang

Experience the legendary battle through our interactive timeline. Watch Tran Hung Dao's brilliant strategy unfold!

⚔️ Battle of Bach Dang 1288 - Historically Accurate Recreation

Historical Legend

Mongol War Fleet (400+ ships)
Vietnamese Naval Force
Iron-tipped Stakes (3,000+)
Bach Dang River
Islands & Sandbars

Preparation Phase

March 1288 - The Silent Foundation

Vietnamese forces secretly plant over 3,000 iron-tipped wooden stakes across Bach Dang River in strategic rows, invisible at high tide but deadly when exposed.

Phase:1 of 5
Time:night
Tide Level:HIGH
Stakes Visible:NO
Formation:APPROACHING
